title: How to create questionnaires to be sent to clients
excerpt: How to create questionnaires to be sent to clients for details that need to be returned and attached to specific boards.  Thanks

posts.author: LesleyL (Lesley Lanir )
posts.cookedHtml: How to create questionnaires to be sent to clients for details that need to be returned and attached to specific boards. Thanks

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Lesley!

You could use our forms feature and send your clients the links to these forms. When they fill out the forms, the form submissions will populate your boards as items.

Does this sound like a good fit for what you’re looking for?

Here are some resources to help you get started with monday WorkForms:

  • All about monday WorkForms
  • Build out your WorkForm

posts.author: LesleyL (Lesley Lanir )
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi thanks for responding,
I think our questionnaires might be too long for the forms - some have 10 questions with lots of parts.
